The landscape is composed of vibrant rice fields, mangrove forests, canals, and waterways that perfectly form the outline of Bangladesh. A massive Bangladesh national flag waves proudly on a tall flagpole. Traditional wooden boats, colorful sailboats, cargo ships, and rickshaws travel through the rivers and village roads. In the foreground, a beautiful young South Asian woman wearing a red floral salwar kameez with a royal blue dupatta and blue leggings sits gracefully on giant 3D stone letters spelling "BANGLADESH", smiling confidently at the camera.
